commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=1ad70d31f0013fa25686775df2e17faa7645a3b4)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a getMyCommands-based remote-state check across Telegram command scopes and language variants before skipping command registration on a matching local command hash, plus regression tests.

PR surface: Source +52, Tests +54. Total +106 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction shape: current main returns early on a matching command hash before any remote check, while the linked report shows Telegram getMyCommands returning an empty list with that local hash still present. I did not run a live Telegram reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers are a narrow lint/test repair plus current-head external Telegram proof; ClawSweeper should not queue a repair lane while contributor-side real behavior proof is still missing.

target.title: #92944: Telegram commands can remain empty after interrupted sync due to stale local command hash
target.author: zhiqiang26

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
